name: Sublimation Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>昇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－エクスパラディン
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can equip 1 FIRE Warrior or 1 Gemini monster from your hand or Deck to this card as an Equip Spell that gives this card 500 ATK. If this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card while equipped with a Gemini monster(s): You can Special Summon as many of those Gemini monsters from your GY as possible, as Effect Monsters that gain their effects. You can only use each effect of "Sublimation Knight" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can equip 1 FIRE Warrior or 1 Gemini monster from your hand or Deck to this card as an Equip Spell that gives this card 500 ATK. If this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card while equipped with a Gemini monster(s): You can Special Summon as many of those Gemini monsters from your GY as possible, as Effect Monsters that gain their effects. You can only use each effect of "Sublimation Knight" once per turn.

If this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card while equipped with a Gemini monster(s): You can Special Summon as many of those Gemini monsters from your GY as possible, as Effect Monsters that gain their effects. You can only use each effect of "Sublimation Knight" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's hand to itself
Equips monsters from the player's Deck to itself
Grants effect to Equip Spell Card
Activates if destroyed by card effect
stat_change: Changes Gemini monsters into Effect Monsters
